premises.statement: The finite reviewed solubility table produces BaSO4, CaCO3, Cu(OH)2 and Fe(OH)3 by ionic reassociation.
Reactant salts and precipitates preserve explicit monatomic or covalently bonded polyatomic ion groups during ionic reassociation.
The listed monatomic and polyatomic ion states form the closed structural domain for these reassociations.
Formation of the selected insoluble ionic product is compatible with the theoretical precipitation outcome.

applicability.required_context: both ionic reactant graphs and an insoluble product are present in the reviewed solubility table
